### Download a Document

`<roostify:downloading-document>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Required. ID of the document to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve a Lead

`<roostify:get-lead>`

The leads endpoint accepts parameters to create a Lead in Roostify. Each parameter must be
allowlisted or it is not allowed within the system.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Lead Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the lead.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### List Messages

`<roostify:get-messages>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### List Accounts

`<roostify:listing-accounts>`

Retrieve a list of all accounts.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page of the index which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present, the pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present, the pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### List Documents

`<roostify:listing-documents>`

Retrieve metadata for documents.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page of the index which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Filter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Term for filtering document metadata based presence of reference_id.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Terms for searching document metadata. Current searchable terms are: document_name, loan_application_reference_id, and loan_application_id.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### List Loan Applications

`<roostify:listing-loan-applications>`

This retrieves all loan applications belonging to your account or its descendants. For clients with
many loan applications, this may time out if you do not use pagination.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Only lists loan applications which match the given attributes. Param structure is search[attribute]=â¦â</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page of the index which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filters loan applications based on when loan applications are created. The string must be formatted as two ISO-8601 datestamps separated by 'â¦â'. If the time zone designator is omitted it defaults to UTC.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Submitted</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filters loan applications based on when loan applications are submitted. The string must be formatted as two ISO-8601 datestamps separated by 'â¦â'. If the time zone designator is omitted it defaults to UTC.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Updated</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filters loan applications based on when loan applications are updated. The string must be formatted as two ISO-8601 datestamps separated by 'â¦â'. If the time zone designator is omitted it defaults to UTC.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Listing Tasks

`<roostify:listing-tasks>`

Return a list of all tasks and their details.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Loan_application_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Loan application ID to search for associated tasks.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page number which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### List Users

`<roostify:listing-users>`

List all users with their details.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page of the index which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Search</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Only lists users that match the given attributes. Param structure is search[attribute]=â¦â Takes a url encoded hash of search parameters.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Listing Webhook Events

`<roostify:listing-webhook-events>`

Webhook events record every instance in which a webhook was fired for a particular event, and can
act as an audit log for all events that occur that are trackable via webhooks.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page of the index which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Created</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ISO 8601 DateTime range. Scope the returned results to only webhook events that were created this range of dates.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### List Webhooks

`<roostify:listing-webhooks>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the page of the index which should be returned. When this parameter is not present and count is, it defaults to 1. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Count</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates the number of records per page returned. When this parameter is not present and page is, it defaults to 100. When both parameters are not present pagination is disabled.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reference Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the loan application to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Retrieve a Loan Application in FNM Format

`<roostify:loan-applications-fnm>`

Unlike most of the API, the loan applications FNM endpoint returns plaintext instead of JSON. The
string returned is a Base64-encoded Fannie Mae file.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the loan application to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Mime Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Encoding</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve a Loan Application

`<roostify:loan-applications-id>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Find_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the loan application to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY

- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND

### Retrieve a Loan Application in MISMO Format

`<roostify:loan-applications-mismo>`

The ability to download a loan application in MISMO format must be requested from your Partner or
Client Success Manager.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the loan application to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Mime Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Encoding</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve a Service

`<roostify:retrieve-your-service>`

Applications built on Roostify often need to have configuration or other kinds of data tied to a
particular user or account. For instance, if building a product to synchronize loan applications
from Roostify to a loan origination system, you may want to have lenders provide their username for
the loan origination system so you can properly assign them. These are considered User Settings.
Account Settings are for data that is shared across a collection of users on an account. Lenders and
account admins may set the values for these settings through the Roostify UI.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve a Task

`<roostify:retrieving-a-task>`

Retrieve a single task details.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Task Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of task.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve an Account

`<roostify:retrieving-account>`

Roostify users are members of an account. Accounts manages billing, permissions, service
integrations, application and workflow customizations, co-branding styles, etc. You may access the
basic information of any account that has an integration with your service.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the account.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve a Document Metadata

`<roostify:retrieving-document>`

Retrieve the metadata for a document.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Find_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the document to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

`<roostify:retrieving-message>`

### Retrieve an Integration Service

`<roostify:retrieving-settings>`

Roostify Services are customizable on an account level. The /settings endpoint provides access to
the service settings and configurations. These are returned as key/value pairs. For instance, if
Roostify leverages an Integration that requires configurations, these fields, values, and the
associated Lender on the Account are returned via this GET request.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN
- ROOSTIFY:REQUEST_TIMEOUT

### Retrieve a User

`<roostify:retrieving-user>`

Get details of a single user.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the user</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- ROOSTIFY:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- ROOSTIFY:UN_PROCESSABLE_ENTITY
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
- ROOSTIFY:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- ROOSTIFY:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- ROOSTIFY:UNAUTHORIZED
- ROOSTIFY:FORBIDDEN
- ROOSTIFY:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- ROOSTIFY:CONFLICT
- ROOSTIFY:BAD_REQUEST
- ROOSTIFY:DEAD_TOKEN

`<roostify:retrieving-webhook>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Webhook Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the webhook to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- ROOSTIFY:BAD_GATEWAY
- ROOSTIFY:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

- ROOSTIFY:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- ROOSTIFY:CONNECTIVITY
- ROOSTIFY:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- ROOSTIFY:NOT_FOUND
